title: GenomeLens 热图
description: 用于把矩阵型结果渲染为热图，适合展示物种间相似度、基因集富集、距离矩阵或其他二维定量关系，帮助快速识别聚类格局、异常样本与强弱关联区域。
description_en: Renders matrix-style results as a heatmap. It is suitable for visualizing inter-species similarity, gene-set enrichment, distance matrices, or other two-dimensional quantitative relationships, helping users quickly identify clustering patterns, outliers, and regions of strong or weak association.
context: 二维定量关系与聚类结构展示。
context_en: Display of two-dimensional quantitative relationships and clustering structure.

params.label: 矩阵 CSV
params.description: 待绘制的矩阵 CSV 文件。行列通常代表物种、样本、基因集或其他比较单元，数值大小将决定热图中的颜色强弱。
params.description_en: Matrix CSV file to plot. Rows and columns typically represent species, samples, gene sets, or other comparison units, and the numeric values determine the color intensity in the heatmap.

params.label: 输出目录
params.description: 热图输出目录。这里通常会生成展示矩阵关系的图件文件。
params.description_en: Output directory for heatmap results. This usually contains the figure files visualizing matrix relationships.

params.label: 输出格式
params.description: 热图输出格式。若需要继续编辑标签或组合图版，建议优先使用矢量格式。
params.description_en: Output format for the heatmap. Vector formats are recommended when labels or composite figure layout may be edited later.

params.label: colormap
params.description: 热图颜色映射方案，例如 `jet` 或 `viridis`。不同 colormap 会影响强弱差异与分层结构的可读性。
params.description_en: Color mapping scheme for the heatmap, such as `jet` or `viridis`. Different colormaps affect how clearly intensity differences and stratified structure can be read.

params.label: 行分组文件
params.description: 可选的行分组文件，用于把矩阵行按类别分组展示，便于观察同组样本或同类条目的聚集模式。
params.description_en: Optional row-group file used to display matrix rows by category, making it easier to inspect clustering patterns among samples or entries within the same group.

params.label: 首行作为列分组
params.description: 是否将输入矩阵首行解释为列分组信息，以便在热图中显示列侧分组结构。
params.description_en: Whether the first row of the input matrix should be interpreted as column-group information so that column-side grouping structure can be displayed in the heatmap.

params.label: 水平色条
params.description: 是否显示水平色条，用于帮助解释颜色与数值强度的对应关系。
params.description_en: Whether to display a horizontal color bar, helping readers interpret the mapping between color and numeric intensity.
